location: SCORES Strip Club, Oakland Park FL
text: Witness states Epstein and Maxwell at SCORES strip club in 2008 discussing recruitment of minors for trafficking network.
Anonymous tip: Tarpon Springs attorney and father served as a former recruiter for Epstein in Florida.
Victim describes sexual encounter with Epstein at age 15 in Virginia Beach.

Epstein's staff asked to run a license plate check on a vehicle parked outside his NY house.
